title: Décor Double Wall Stainless Steel Travel Mug - Keeps 4 Hours Hot - 12 Hours Cold - Car Cup Holder Compatible - Secure Flip Top Lid - 450ml Lavender.
features: KEEPS DRINKS HOT FOR 4 HOURS: The Decor 450ml Travel Mug keeps your drinks hot for 4 hours and cold for 12 hours. Made with vacuum insulated stainless steel for superior thermal performance and designed to keep your coffee, tea, hot chocolate, herbal teas etc with that perfect fresh made taste.

LIGHTWEIGHT AND STYLISH- Our 450ml Travel Mug has a slimline design is a convenient size for car cup holders,desks and a great on the go travel mug.The beautiful lavender colour is a great accessory to any outfit or occasion. Also available in Graphite, Silver and Black.

ROBUST LID MECHANISM - secure flip top lid and easy opening/locking mechanism for a safe drinking experience. Our Travel Mug range is dual purpose for hot and cold use, making this the ideal all day re-usable drinking option.

ECO-FRIENDLY TRAVEL MUG: At Décor we create high quality, reusable and durable mugs and flasks that are designed to last offering our customers a cost-saving & environmentally friendly drinking solutions that reduce single use cups and mugs

DÉCOR have over 60 years market experience of providing leading food storage, hydration and lunch solutions that are not only functional, exceptional value for money but also at the heart of our consumers needs.
